## Section title

This is a mini [quarto](https://quarto.org/) document with text and some R code.  

- in RStudio, click "Render" at the top
- in VScode, click the Preview button (topright)

This will execute the code chunks and weave together the text, code and output.

In RStudio, I recommend to set (Cog symbol)  
- `Preview in Viewer Pane`  
- and (personal preference) `Chunk Output in Console`.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pairs(iris[, 1:4], main="Anderson's Iris Data",
      col=c("orange", "salmon", "lightblue")[unclass(iris$Species)], 
	  pch=16, cex=1.5, lower.panel=NULL, las=1)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](5a_check_quarto_files/figure-html/plot_example-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


More in lesson i.2, specifically the homework.
